date.description: UTC date derived from the Unix timestamp in the DPS endpoint.

benchmark_name.description: Benchmark symbol from the DPS endpoint, currently KSE100, KSE30, or KMI30.

index_level.description: Observed benchmark level from the endpoint.
index_level.evidence: Matches the DPS live index panel close/current value on 2026-03-12.

volume.description: Observed benchmark volume-like metric from the endpoint.
volume.evidence: Matches the DPS live index panel volume value on 2026-03-12.

open_candidate.description: Fourth endpoint field preserved conservatively because DPS does not label historical field names.
open_candidate.evidence: Consistently falls within the live day range and does not match close, high, low, volume, or previous close on inspected dates.
open_candidate.warning: Treat as inferred until confirmed from a primary PSX historical source or explicit vendor documentation.

quality_checks: Rows are deduplicated by (date, benchmark_name) when the endpoint repeats an exact duplicate.
Non-positive index_level or open_candidate raises an error.
